name: quantinuum-schemas
documentation:
# Quantinuum schemas

Public models that define API boundaries used by Quantinuum.  Intended to be
used across teams and projects ie. shared. Backwards compatibility and semantic
versioning are particularly important in this repo!

## Dependencies

We try to keep the dependencies minimal.
However we do need `pydantic` for validation and `pytket` for core (serialisable) models.

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.hypertket_config
documentation: Configuration options for HyperTKET compilation.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.hypertket_config.HyperTketConfig
documentation: Configuration for HyperTKET compilation.

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info
documentation: Serialization classes for pytket BackendInfo.

functions.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.register_from_pytket_node
documentation: Convert a pytket Node object to a nexus-dataclasses Register object.

functions.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.register_to_pytket_node
documentation: Convert a pytket Node object from a nexus-dataclasses Register object.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.StoredNode
documentation: Node in a quantum device's connectivity graph, along with its error rates.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.StoredEdge
documentation: Edge in a quantum device's connectivity graph, along with its error rates.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.StoredDevice
documentation:
Nodes and edges that together make up a quantum device's connectivity graph.

Based on pytket.architecture.Architecture.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.StoredBackendInfo

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_info.StoredBackendInfo.to_pytket_backend_info
documentation: Reconstruct a pytket BackendInfo from the StoredBackendInfo instance.

Equivalent of pytket's BackendInfo, but in a form that it can be converted to and from JSON
for storage in the Nexus database.

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.h_series_noise
documentation: Validation classes for H series noise models.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.h_series_noise.UserErrorParams
documentation:
User provided error values that override machine values for
emulation of H-series devices.

See the H-series documentation for details of each parameter.

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise
documentation: Validation classes for Aer noise models.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.QiskitBasicInstruction
documentation: Validation model for qiskit instructions without params.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.QiskitPauliInstruction
documentation: Validation model for qiskit pauli string instructions.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.QiskitKrausInstruction
documentation: Validation model for qiskit kraus operator instructions.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerQuantumError

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerQuantumError.validate_id
documentation: Ensure id is a v4 UUID in hex format.

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerQuantumError.noise_ops
documentation: Return a list of qiskit Circuit and probability tuples for use in QuantumError.
pylint: disable=too-many-locals
Validation model for qiskit-aer's QuantumError class.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerReadoutError
documentation: Validation model for qiskit-aer's ReadoutError class.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerNoiseModel

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.AerNoiseModel.to_native
documentation: Convert to a qiskit native NoiseModel.
Validation model for qiskit-aer's NoiseModel class.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.CrosstalkParams

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.CrosstalkParams.from_pytket_crosstalk_params
documentation: Construct a CrosstalkParams from a pytket CrosstalkParams.

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.aer_noise.CrosstalkParams.to_pytket_crosstalk_params
documentation: Construct a pytket CrosstalkParams from a CrosstalkParams.

Based on pytket-qiskit's CrosstalkParams model.
Stores various parameters for modelling crosstalk noise.

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.exceptions
documentation: Custom exceptions.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.exceptions.OptionalDependencyError
documentation: Exception for import error

modules.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config
documentation:
Defines classes that pass information about the backend to be used for processing
a circuit, and any parameters needed to set up an instance of that backend.

These do not include any parameters that are used to pass access tokens or other credentials,
as our backend credential classes handle those.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.BaseBackendConfig
documentation: Base class for all the backend configs.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.AerConfig

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.AerConfig.validate_noise_model
documentation: Validate that we can use this
Qiskit Aer QASM simulator.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.AerStateConfig
documentation: Qiskit Aer state vector simulator.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.AerUnitaryConfig
documentation: Qiskit Aer unitary simulator.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.BraketConfig

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.BraketConfig.check_local_remote_parameters_are_consistent
documentation:
Validate that the parameters for BraketConfig are consistent for either a local device,
or a remote device.
Runs circuits on quantum devices and simulators using Amazon's Braket service.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.QuantinuumCompilerOptions

methods.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.QuantinuumCompilerOptions.check_field_values_are_supported_types
documentation: Check that compiler option values are supported types.

Class for Quantinuum Compiler Options.

Intentionally allows extra unknown flags to be defined.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.QuantinuumConfig

class_variables.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.QuantinuumConfig.device_name
documentation: The quantum computer or simulator to run a circuit on.
Runs circuits on Quantinuum's quantum devices and simulators.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.IBMQConfig

class_variables.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.IBMQConfig.backend_name
documentation: The quantum computer or simulator to run a circuit on.
Runs circuits on IBM's quantum devices.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.IBMQEmulatorConfig

class_variables.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.IBMQEmulatorConfig.backend_name
documentation: The quantum computer to emulate.

Runs circuits on a Nexus-hosted simulator which uses the noise model of a
specific IBM quantum device.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.ProjectQConfig
documentation: ProjectQ state vector simulator.

classes.name: quantinuum_schemas.models.backend_config.QulacsConfig
documentation: Qulacs simulator.
